log_segment_size.name: log_segment_size
log_segment_size.description: The maximum size of a log segment file. When a segment file reaches this size, Redpanda closes it and creates a new segment.

enable_sasl.name: enable_sasl
enable_sasl.description: Enable SASL authentication for Kafka connections. When enabled, clients must authenticate using one of the configured SASL mechanisms.

retention_bytes.name: retention_bytes
retention_bytes.description: The maximum size of a partition's log before old segments are deleted. A value of -1 or `null` means no size-based retention limit. Can be overridden per topic.

cloud_storage_enabled.name: cloud_storage_enabled
cloud_storage_enabled.description: Enable Tiered Storage. When enabled, Redpanda can offload log segments to object storage.

kafka_connections_max.name: kafka_connections_max
kafka_connections_max.description: The maximum number of Kafka client connections allowed per broker. A value of `null` means unlimited connections.

group_max_session_timeout_ms.name: group_max_session_timeout_ms
group_max_session_timeout_ms.description: The maximum session timeout for consumer groups. If a consumer does not send a heartbeat within this time, it is considered dead and removed from the group.
